# API Checklist: First-Class All-Elements Assertions

**Purpose**: Validate requirement quality, compatibility constraints, and cross-artifact consistency for the AllSatisfy API.
**Created**: 2026-05-08
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are both public AllSatisfy overloads fully specified with complete signatures (inspector shape, because, becauseArgs, return type)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001, Spec §FR-002, Contract §Public Methods]
- [x] CHK002 Are null-subject and null-inspector requirements both present and non-overlapping? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003, Spec §FR-004, Contract §Behavioral Contract]
- [x] CHK003 Are all required aggregated-diagnostic elements explicitly listed (failed count, detailed failures, indices, because application)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-008, Spec §FR-010, Spec §FR-016]
- [x] CHK004 Are exception-source paths fully covered as separate requirements (inspector exception vs source enumeration exception)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-008, Spec §FR-019, Contract §Behavioral Contract]
- [x] CHK005 Are compatibility requirements complete for every collection entry point in scope? [Completeness, Spec §FR-012, Contract §Scope and Compatibility]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK006 Is "full per-failure details" defined concretely enough to know required fields in output? [Clarity, Spec §FR-008, Spec §FR-016, Contract §Behavioral Contract]
- [x] CHK007 Is "range-compressed ordered indices" specified with enough format detail to avoid multiple interpretations? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-020, Research §R-006]
- [x] CHK008 Is "successful enumeration" in FR-006 clearly scoped so it cannot conflict with FR-019? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006, Spec §FR-019]
- [x] CHK009 Is "assertion-related exception" clearly defined to distinguish it from other exception classes? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-008, Contract §Behavioral Contract]
- [x] CHK010 Is "standard failure pipeline" explicitly traceable to named components and expected responsibility boundaries? [Clarity, Clarifications §Session 2026-05-08]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK011 Do ordering requirements align across clarifications, FR-017, and quickstart diagnostic examples? [Consistency, Clarifications §Session 2026-05-08, Spec §FR-017, Quickstart §3]
- [x] CHK012 Do 50-detail-cap statements align between acceptance scenarios, FR-016, and quickstart wording? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 2 Scenario 4, Spec §FR-016, Quickstart §3]
- [x] CHK013 Do 100-index-threshold statements align between acceptance scenarios, FR-020, and quickstart index rules? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 2 Scenario 8, Spec §FR-020, Quickstart §4]
- [x] CHK014 Are thrown-type constraints consistent between FR-006, FR-018, and contract behavioral table? [Consistency, Spec §FR-006, Spec §FR-018, Contract §Behavioral Contract]
- [x] CHK015 Are out-of-scope boundaries consistent across spec requirements, assumptions, and contract scope section? [Consistency, Spec §FR-013, Spec §FR-014, Spec §Assumptions, Contract §Scope and Compatibility]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK016 Are success criteria SC-001 through SC-011 objectively measurable without subjective interpretation? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-001, Spec §SC-011]
- [x] CHK017 Do success criteria cover every high-risk compatibility rule (throw type, ordering, detail cap, index formatting)? [Coverage, Spec §SC-007, Spec §SC-011]
- [x] CHK018 Is non-regression for existing AllSatisfy(Action<T>) semantics explicitly measurable rather than implied? [Gap, Spec §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK019 Are acceptance scenarios mapped to both overload signatures, not only element-only inspector usage? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §FR-001, Spec §FR-002, Spec §User Story 3]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK020 Are primary scenarios defined for pass, single-fail, multi-fail, and empty-collection outcomes? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 1]
- [x] CHK021 Are alternate scenarios defined for mixed failure causes within a single run? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 2 Scenario 2]
- [x] CHK022 Are exception scenarios complete for null subject, null inspector, inspector exception, and enumeration exception? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-003, Spec §FR-004, Spec §FR-019]
- [x] CHK023 Are continuation semantics after first inspector failure explicitly specified as full traversal behavior? [Coverage, Spec §FR-005]
- [x] CHK024 Are dispatch-compatibility scenarios present for all declarations listed in scope? [Coverage, Spec §FR-012, Quickstart §6]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK025 Are boundary cases around the 50-detail threshold (49, 50, 51 failures) explicitly covered or intentionally excluded? [Gap, Spec §FR-016]
- [x] CHK026 Are boundary cases around the 100-index threshold (100, 101 failures) explicitly covered or intentionally excluded? [Coverage, Spec §FR-020]
- [x] CHK027 Are compression edge cases (singletons, contiguous ranges, sparse gaps) defined sufficiently for consistent output interpretation? [Gap, Spec §FR-020, Research §R-006]
- [x] CHK028 Is expected behavior defined for because/becauseArgs formatting anomalies in aggregated output paths? [Gap, Spec §FR-010]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK029 Are performance requirements for aggregation and formatting quantified enough for release-gate decisions? [Gap, Plan §Performance Goals]
- [x] CHK030 Are maintainability constraints (file size/complexity strategy) expressed as enforceable requirement checks, not only planning notes? [NFR, Plan §Constitution Check]
- [x] CHK031 Is diagnostic-output boundedness specified in terms that prevent unbounded memory or message growth? [NFR, Spec §FR-016, Spec §FR-020]

## Dependencies and Assumptions

- [x] CHK032 Are dependencies on MessageFormatter and AssertionConfiguration documented as stable assumptions or explicit requirement dependencies? [Dependency, Clarifications §Session 2026-05-08, Contract §Behavioral Contract]
- [x] CHK033 Is the assumption that all listed dispatch types resolve to GenericCollectionAssertions<T> backed by explicit requirement traceability? [Assumption, Spec §FR-012, Quickstart §6]

## Ambiguities and Conflicts

- [x] CHK034 Is there any unresolved conflict between "include all failing indices" and "range-compressed rendering" semantics? [Conflict, Spec §FR-016, Spec §FR-020]

## Notes

- Checklist depth: Formal release gate.
- Primary risk emphasis: API compatibility semantics.
- Scope: Full cross-artifact review (spec, contract, quickstart, plan).
- Validation iteration count: 2
- All checklist items are now marked complete and implementation may proceed.
